title: Senior Financial Analyst - Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Nagpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd!
